/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/HorrorGame.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libHorrorGame.so -o libHorrorGame.so CMakeFiles/HorrorGame.dir/GDExtension.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HorrorGame.dir/GameSettings/Settings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HorrorGame.dir/Scenes/MainScene/HomeMapLoader/HomeMapLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/HorrorGame.dir/Scenes/MainScene/Main.cpp.o  /home/B0LD/Documents/Projects/HorrorGame/HorrorGameCXX/Dev/../../godot-cpp/bin/libgodot-cpp.linux.template_debug.x86_64.a
